title: Delicate Flaky Russian Yellow Pepper Pilaf
description: A citrusy and adventurous Russian dish featuring yellow pepper, with a shio-cure and vegan-friendly ingredients, this pilaf is a unique and flavorful experience.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the brown rice, shio-cure seasoning, lemon juice, olive oil, chopped onion, minced garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Cut the yellow peppers into large chunks and add them to the bowl, stirring gently to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake for 30 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes.
Remove the pilaf from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork to separate the grains and serve hot.
Garnish with additional lemon juice and chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
